SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-04-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. KENNY FUNG--CANTONESE INTERPRETER WAS PRESENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF CHUN LIANG. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
